name: InsightTest AI
tagline: Low-code, AI-powered testing that cuts QA effort by 60–70%.
description: Unified tests for mobile, web, API, and analytics — built by anyone on your team. Self-healing automation that adapts when your UI changes.
longDescription: Drag-and-drop builder, AI-generated test cases, self-healing when your UI shifts. One platform for mobile, web, API, and analytics — instead of five separate tools that never quite talk to each other.
forWhom: For engineering heads, QA leads, and product teams at companies shipping software weekly.

keyCapabilities.title: Drag-and-drop test builder
keyCapabilities.description: Anyone on the team can author tests. No Selenium scripts, no Cypress boilerplate.

keyCapabilities.title: AI-generated cases
keyCapabilities.description: Upload a user story or a Figma flow; InsightTest generates the test cases and edge conditions automatically.

keyCapabilities.title: Self-healing automation
keyCapabilities.description: When your UI changes, tests adapt using semantic selectors — not brittle XPaths. No more weekly maintenance sprints.

keyCapabilities.title: One platform, four surfaces
keyCapabilities.description: Flutter, native mobile, web, and API testing in a single flow. BrowserStack integrated; runs serverless on AWS Lambda.

outcomes: Release cycles shorten from weeks to days
QA teams shift from firefighting to strategy
Coverage increases without hiring more testers
